reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The output document contains an explicit omission tag: '33 sections omitted for token budget'. This has resulted in the loss of substantial portions of the document. Specifically, Sections 2.1 through 2.3 (covering the statutory framework, governance, and infrastructure on pages 10-20) and the entirety of Section 3 (Next Generation 911, pages 21-31) are missing. concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source document includes sections 2.1 through 2.3 (pages 10-20), Section 3 (pages 21-31), and comprehensive data tables in Appendices B and C (pages 46-50).
concerns.location: Sections following 1.4 Methodology (index 7), and Appendix sections (index 50, 51)

concerns.analysis: Several tables are either missing or severely truncated. Table 2 (Study Group members, page 8) and Table 3 (Population breakdown, page 9) are missing. The Appendix B table, which lists 100 counties, only contains the state total row in the output. The Appendix C table, which contains dozens of standards across several categories, only contains one data row in the output. These tables have far more than 20% of their rows missing.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Appendix B (pages 46-48) contains estimates for all 100 North Carolina counties. Appendix C (pages 49-50) contains dozens of entries across categories like Security, VoIP, and Wellness.
concerns.output_quote: The tables for Appendix B and Appendix C in the output only contain one data row each.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: The document suffers from significant text omission within its sections due to the truncation of the Appendix tables. For instance, Appendix C is intended to be a comprehensive reference chart of NENA standards, but the output omits approximately 95% of this information, leaving only the first entry of the first category.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Appendix C (pages 49-50) lists numerous documents under categories: DATA STRUCTURES, DATA MANAGEMENT, NG911 TRANSITION, SECURITY, VoIP, NG911, WIRELESS, and WELLNESS.
concerns.output_quote: Appendix C table contains only one document (NENA-STA-015.10-2018).
